mapper.insert: insert into product(shop_id, category_id, name, price, stock, description, image_url, sales, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{shopId}, #{categoryId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{sales}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update product
shop_id = #{shopId},
category_id = #{categoryId},
name = #{name},
price = #{price},
stock = #{stock},
description = #{description},
image_url = #{imageUrl},
sales = #{sales},
status = #{status},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
